title: Trump bus covered in MAGA signs crashes in NYC on the way to rally
shortDescription: No one was hurt after a Trump-themed bus that sold souvenirs of the former president crashed into a large pole in NYC.

title: Biden said he lacked authority to act on the border. He's doing it anyway.
shortDescription: Congress frozen, President Joe Biden is using executive authority on immigration before the 2024 election his administration said he did not have.

title: Democratic governor candidate hits GOP rival over abortion comments
shortDescription: Democratic candidate Josh Stein's campaign launched a new ad against Republican Mark Robinson, as abortion remains a key issue in their race.

title: What are the charges Hunter Biden faces?
shortDescription: Hunter Biden has been charged with three felonies over whether he lied on a federal form and, if convicted, faces up to 25 years in prison.

title: Wisconsin charges former Trump associates in fake elector scheme
shortDescription: Wisconsin Attorney General Josh Kaul filed forgery charges against attorneys Kenneth Chesebro and Jim Troupis and former Trump aide Mike Roman.

title: GOP plots revenge as Trump conviction hits Congress | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Dr. Anthony Fauci's testimony on Capitol Hill over the COVID-19 pandemic response. Court blocks grants to some businesses owned by Black women.

title: AZ border mayors reject Biden invite to DC asylum event
shortDescription: The Biden administration's executive order is expected to immediately shut down asylum processing in between official crossings at the U.S.-Mexico border.

title: GOP plots revenge as Donald Trump conviction hits Congress
shortDescription: Republican lawmakers are hoping to retaliate against prosecutors after Donald Trump's conviction.

title: Jill Biden spends birthday in court for Hunter Biden felony gun trial
shortDescription: The Biden family has come out for a show of support as Hunter Biden's felony gun trial gets underway in a federal courtroom.

title: AG Garland calls House GOP attacks on DOJ 'unprecedented'
shortDescription: Attorney General Merrick Garland pushes back on Republican attacks at contentious hearing of the House Judiciary Committee Tuesday.

title: How D-Day’s roots play crucial role for Trump, Biden in 2024 election
shortDescription: Military alliances that have become the subject of dispute among the 2024 presidential candidates Biden and Trump are rooted in the D-Day invasion of June 6, 1944.

title: Who is Abbe Lowell? Hunter Biden lawyer worked for Ivanka Trump
shortDescription: Hunter Biden hired a Washington scandal powerhouse lawyer after his plea deal fell through. Abbe Lowell has represented Jared Kushner and Ivanka Trump

title: Hunter Biden trial updates: FBI agent takes the stand as first witness
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's struggle with drug addiction is at the center of his trial about gun charges. Opening arguments are slated to begin Tuesday.

title: Donald Trump says he will appeal his historic felony conviction
shortDescription: Donald Trump said Friday he will appeal the guilty verdict that made him the first person to serve as president to be convicted of a crime.

title: Sen. Bob Menendez will seek re-election in New Jersey as an independent
shortDescription: Sen. Bob Menendez, amid a federal bribery trial, filed petitions to run for re-election in New Jersey in November as an independent on Monday.

title: Three ways abortion access could be on Nebraska's 2024 ballot
shortDescription: Voters in the Cornhusker State could see three separate abortion-related ballot initiatives on the ballot this November.

title: How will Sen. Joe Manchin's switch to independent impact Congress?
shortDescription: Manchin's defection from the Democratic party isn't expected to make a big difference in the U.S. Senate.

title: Biden will authorize US to turn away migrants at Mexico border
shortDescription: President Joe Biden will sign an executive order allowing the U.S. to turn away migrants who enter the country via Mexico without legal permission.

title: OnPolitics: Hunter Biden's trial may hinge on one day
shortDescription: Hunter Biden went on trial at a federal courthouse in Wilmington, Delaware, Monday over charges he lied on a federal gun form.

title: Georgia court to hear Trump appeal in Oct., trial likely past election
shortDescription: A Georgia appeals court set Donald Trump's argument to remove the prosecutor in his case for October, too late for trial before election.

title: Here are the races likely to headline Hawaii's 2024 elections
shortDescription: The Aloha State's 2024 primary election rundown reveals few major battles but potential political shifts.

title: Who is David Weiss? Meet Hunter Biden's Trump-appointed investigator
shortDescription: Justice Department special counsel David Weiss investigated President Joe Biden's son Hunter Biden. He was appointed by Donald Trump.

title: White House denies 'gaps' between Biden on cease-fire plan and Israel
shortDescription: President Joe Biden continues to push the cease-fire deal he laid out on Friday, as the White House denied there are 'gaps' between the U.S. and Israel.
